  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Water heater installed without a required safety pan (drip pan) beneath it, creating a risk of property damage from leaks or T&P discharge."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Disconnect the water heater, install an approved watertight corrosion-resistant pan with a minimum 3/4-inch drain line piped to an approved disposal location, and reconnect the unit."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the IPC (Section 504.7) and IRC (Section P2804.1) require a pan beneath a water heater where leakage will cause damage to the building structure or adjacent areas. Operating the asset without this pan is a code violation and poses a significant risk of water damage.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.7",
    "IRC P2804.1"
  ]
}
